description.content:
- [Generate API key and token](/en/tools/api/key-and-token/)
- Password reset token generation and verification
- [Switch user](/en/docs/switch-user/) API key and token generation

item.name: Performs authentication to access to the Soracom API.

request.name: Performs authentication to access to the Soracom API.

description.content:
Performs authentication to access to the Soracom API. Please include the following information in your request.

- To perform authentication by a root account, specify `email` and `password`.
- To perform authentication by an AuthKey, specify `authKeyId` and `authKey`.
- To perform authentication by a SAM user, specify `operatorId`, `userName` and `password`.

An API key and API token will be included in the response if successful. Use the API key and API token to perform subsequent requests.

item.name: Revokes an API key and API token in order to remove access to the Soracom API.

request.name: Revokes an API key and API token in order to remove access to the Soracom API.

description.content: Revokes the API key and API token that was used to call this API. Once revoked, the API key and API token cannot be used to make further requests to the API, regardless of the key and token's original expiration time. This API can be called regardless of any permission settings.

response.name: Successfully revoked the API key and the API token.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Issues a password reset token for the operator.

request.name: Issues a password reset token for the operator.

description.content: Generates a password reset token and sends it to the operator's primary email address. After receiving the password reset token, call /v1/auth/password_reset_token/verify API with the token to update the operator's password.

response.name: Password reset token successfully sent to the specified email address.

item.name: Verifies the password reset token and updates password.

request.name: Verifies the password reset token and updates password.

description.content: Updates the operator's password if the password reset token is verified.

item.name: Generates an API key and an API token to call APIs as a different user.

request.name: Generates an API key and an API token to call APIs as a different user.

description.content: Using the API key and API token of the original user, call this API to issue an API key and API token of the target user that you are switching to. The original user should already be registered in the target user's trust policy. See [User:updateUserTrustPolicy](#!/User/updateUserTrustPolicy) for information on updating the trust policy.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Issues a token to revoke operator's MFA. The issued token will be sent to the operator via email.

Verifies the one-time token which is previously issued by calling `/operators/mfa_revoke_token/issue` API, operator's email address, password, and one of the backup codes. If verified, operator's MFA is going to be revoked.

item.name: Issue an authentication token to add an email address

request.name: Issue an authentication token to add an email address

description.content:
Generates an authentication token for adding a new email address and sends it to the specified email address. This authentication token is used with [Email:verifyAddEmailToken API](#/Email/verifyAddEmailToken) to complete email address verification and addition.

**Warning**: This API can only be executed with root user credentials.

response.name: Authentication token successfully issued and sent to the specified email address.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Verify an authentication token to add an email address

request.name: Verify an authentication token to add an email address

description.content:
Verifies the authentication token issued by [Email:issueAddEmailToken API](#/Email/issueAddEmailToken) and adds the email address to the operator.

**Warning**: Authentication tokens have an expiration time. Expired authentication tokens cannot be used.

response.name: Email address successfully verified and added to the operator.

description.content: [Access management (Soracom Access Management)](/en/docs/sam/)
Returns a list of roles.

query.description:
Filters by the type of the role. Specify one of the following:
- `operator`: Operator managed role (default)
- `soracom`: Soracom managed role
- `all`: All roles

response.name: OK.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Gets user trust policy for switching user.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Updates the trust policy of the user specified by `operator_id` and `user_name` parameters.

**Warning**: Setting a trust policy will allow the operator(s) or user(s) specified in the request body to switch to this SAM user. When switching, the trusted operator(s) or user(s) will be granted the same permissions as this SAM user, and may be able to see session history, traffic history, and other account information.

response.name: Successfully updated a trust policy for the user.

info.name: Soracom Auth and Access Management API

description.content: Authenticate operators, manage users and roles (Soracom Access Management), MFA, email, system notifications, and account switching.
